tasks.check: deno fmt --check apps scripts deno.json runtime/deno-manifest.json && deno lint apps scripts && deno check apps/workbench/src/main.tsx apps/workbench/src/genui/compiler.worker.ts apps/workbench/genui/preview-shell.ts scripts/*.ts
tasks.build:workbench: deno task clean:workbench && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=linked --outdir=dist/workbench apps/workbench/index.html && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=linked --output=dist/workbench/compiler.worker.js apps/workbench/src/genui/compiler.worker.ts && deno bundle --platform=browser --sourcemap=inline --output=dist/workbench/genui/preview-shell.js apps/workbench/genui/preview-shell.ts && deno run --allow-read=apps/workbench/genui,dist/workbench/genui --allow-write=dist/workbench/genui scripts/inline_preview_shell.ts && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=dist/workbench scripts/copy_esbuild_wasm.ts && deno run --allow-read=dist/workbench --allow-write=dist/workbench scripts/verify_workbench_build.ts
